> Specializing in C# and .NET, scalable APIs, and AI-integrated backend systems.

## Skills
C#, .NET, Node.js, PHP, MySQL, React, Next.js, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, Git

## Projects
- Task Management App: React + Node.js task manager hosted on AWS EC2
- AOPC Content Management System: CMS for the AOPC organization
- Teacher's Report Management System: Generates and manages teacher reports
- Web Scraper Extension: Built with Next.js
